title: Chef Utveckling & Teknik – Terranor Sverige
description:
*Terranor AB är en ledande leverantör av drift- och underhållstjänster för väginfrastruktur i Norden. Vår ambition är tydlig – att vara kundens självklara förstahandsval inom drift- och vägunderhåll samt mindre mark- och anläggningsarbeten. Terranor är etablerade i hela Sverige med en omsättning på över 2,3 miljarder kronor.*
*Våra engagerade och kompetenta medarbetare är grunden till vår framgång. Nu söker vi fler talanger som vill vara med på vår fortsatta utvecklingsresa. Som en del av Terranor får du stora möjligheter att påverka både din egen och bolagets framtid.*
**Nu söker vi**
 En strategisk och drivande ledare som vill ta ett helhetsgrepp om utveckling, digitalisering och teknik – och samtidigt vara med och bygga nästa nivå av vår verksamhet.
   

  

**Detta är en nyckelroll och en helt ny funktion i vår organisation.** 
 Terranor satsar nu offensivt på att stärka vår förmåga inom utveckling, digitalisering och teknik – och söker dig som vill ta ett helhetsansvar för att bygga, leda och forma området från grunden.
   

  

 Rollen är direkt underställd Sverigechefen och du ingår i ledningsgruppen, med mandat att påverka både riktning, struktur och framtida satsningar.
   

  

 Placeringsort är flexibel – vi finns på ett trettiotal orter i Sverige, och resor ingår som en naturlig del av uppdraget.
   

  

**Om rollen och uppdraget**
 Som
 **Chef Utveckling & Teknik** 
 ansvarar du för att leda, samla och utveckla områdena verksamhetsutveckling, AI/digitalisering och IT i en gemensam, kraftfull funktion. Du blir en nyckelperson i vår fortsatta resa mot att bli branschledande inom innovation, effektivitet och smarta arbetssätt.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Etablera struktur, prioriteringar och arbetssätt för hela utvecklingsområdet
* Identifiera och realisera initiativ som skapar mätbar affärs- och produktionsnytta
* Leda strategiska utvecklingsprojekt – internt och tillsammans med partners
* Skapa förutsättningar för standardisering, effektivisering och innovation i verksamheten
* Säkerställa en modern, säker och affärsstödjande IT-miljö


 Du arbetar nära verksamheten och ledningen – med ett tydligt fokus på att positionera Terranor som en ledande aktör inom digitalisering och teknikutveckling i branschen.
   

  

**Mandatet – och möjligheten**
 Detta är en roll för dig som vill mer än att förvalta.
   

  

 Här får du möjlighet att:
   

  

* Bygga upp en helt ny funktion från grunden
* Forma och utveckla funktionens omfattning och arbetssätt
* Successivt expandera området, exempelvis genom att skapa en egen support- och utvecklingsstruktur över tid
* Sätta en tydlig riktning för hur teknik och digitalisering ska driva affären framåt
* Ta en självklar plats i ledningsgruppen och påverka bolagets strategiska riktning


 Kort sagt – du får mandatet att omsätta ambition till verklig förändring.
   

  

**Vem du är**
 Vi söker dig som redan idag verkar i en senior roll, där du kombinerar ett strategiskt perspektiv med förmågan att skapa resultat i praktiken. Du är en affärsorienterad ledare som både kan tänka långsiktigt och få saker att hända i vardagen.
   

  

 Du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet från ledande befattning med personalansvar
* Bakgrund inom anläggning, drift & underhåll eller närliggande verksamhet
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att driva utvecklings- eller digitaliseringsprojekt
* God förståelse för hur teknik och IT kan skapa affärsvärde
* Hög kommunikativ förmåga och ett pedagogiskt ledarskap


 Du trivs i en roll där du får kombinera strategi, innovation och operativ genomförandekraft.
   

  

**Varför Terranor?**
 På Terranor arbetar vi för att skapa säkra och framkomliga vägar – varje dag. Hos oss erbjuds du en plats i en organisation med stark framåtanda, där nytänkande och vilja att utvecklas är en självklar del av vardagen.
   

  

 Vår kultur präglas av gemenskap och teamkänsla, där vi tillsammans skapar resultat. Vår ambition är att du ska komma till en arbetsplats där du trivs, utvecklas och känner arbetsglädje.
   

  

 Vi är stolta över våra uppdrag och våra medarbetare, och vi tror på frihet under ansvar, tydligt ledarskap och långsiktighet.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder**
* En nyckelroll med stort inflytande i ledningsgruppen
* Möjlighet att påverka och utveckla hela verksamheten
* En organisation som satsar på innovation och utveckling
* En kultur som präglas av våra värderingar: Resultat, Framåtanda, Kompetens och Gemenskap


 Urval och tillsättning sker löpande – skicka därför in din ansökan på svenska redan idag. Sista ansökningsdatum
 **30 juni 2026** 
 .
   

  

 Kontakt från rekryteringsföretag samt CV- och annonssäljare undanbedes.
   

  

**Har du frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta:**
* Per Sjöblom, Sverigechef, 070-371 13 75
* Ginny Sommensjö, Rekryteringsspecialist Terranor, 070-253 05 70 🔗 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ginnysommensjo/


 Du är även välkommen att ta kontakt via LinkedIn.

title: Senior Network Engineer - Infra
description:
**About the role**

  
 


 As a 
 
**Senior Network Engineer**

  within the Connectivity area at Betsson Group, you will work hands-on with 
 
**production network infrastructure**

  that underpins our customer-facing platforms.
 

  
 





 You will operate and improve a hybrid environment spanning 
 
**on**
 ‑
 **prem and AWS**

 , working with technologies such as 
 
**AWS networking services, enterprise routing and switching, VPNs, and firewalls**

 . While we use specific vendors today, we place more value on 
 
**strong networking fundamentals and production experience**

  than experience with any single brand.
 

  
 





 Automation and 
 
**Infrastructure**
 ‑
 **as**
 ‑
 **Code (Terraform and Ansible)**

  are core to how we build and evolve our network platforms, and you will actively contribute to this journey.
 

  
 





  
 



**What 
 

 you’ll
 

  work on**

  
 
* Design, implement, and operate 
 
**production network infrastructure**


* Work hands-on with


* Layer 3 switching and routing


* Network firewalls and VPN technologies


* Hybrid connectivity between on
 
 ‑
 
 prem and AWS


* Build and operate 
 
**AWS networking**

 , including


* VPCs, routing, Transit Gateways / Cloud WAN concepts


* ****Route 53****

  (DNS and traffic management)


* Create and maintain network infrastructure using 
 
**Terraform and Ansible**


* Monitor, troubleshoot, and resolve network incidents in production


* Participate in 
 
**incident, problem, and change management**


* Collaborate closely with


* Connectivity team members


* Architects and Platform teams


* Security and application teams


* Maintain documentation and contribute to shared ways of working


* Take part in a 
 
**24/7 on**
 ‑
 **call rotation**

  supporting production environments




  
 



**Required skills & experience**

  
 
* Experience working as a 
 
**Network Engineer in a production environment**


* Strong hands-on experience with 
 
**enterprise networking**

 , such as


* Routing & switching (e.g. Arista, Cisco, or equivalent)


* Firewalls & VPNs (e.g. Palo Alto, Cisco, Fortinet, or equivalent)


* Load balancing (e.g. F5 preferred or nginx)


* Solid understanding of


* TCP/IP, BGP, VXLAN, routing protocols


* Network security principles


* High
 
 ‑
 
 availability network design


* Practical experience with 
 
**AWS networking**

 , including 
 
**Route 53**


* Experience using 
 
**Terraform**

  for infrastructure or networking resources


* Strong troubleshooting and problem
 
 ‑
 
 solving skills


* Comfortable operating in environments with change management and on
 
 ‑
 
 call responsibilities


* Able to work independently while contributing effectively to a team




  
 



**Nice to have**

  
 
* Experience with AWS / Cloud WAN setups / Other cloud technologies


* Network automation or scripting experience


* Exposure to compliance
 
 ‑
 
 driven environments (PCI DSS, ISO, etc.)


* Experience working in always
 
 ‑
 
 on, 24/7 production systems


* Observability / monitoring experience for network platforms




  
 




  
 


**Who We Are** 

 Betsson Group is one of the largest companies within the Global iGaming space and can trace our heritage as far back as the 1960’s. We’re Swedish and publicly listed too with our Operational HQ located on the Mediterranean Island of Malta.
 



 We strive to deliver the best customer experience in the industry. As a market leader within iGaming we offer online gaming products across 12+ jurisdictions and 20+ brands.
 



 You will be part of a passionate team, which is building an industry leading, scalable, multi-brand platform used by hundreds of thousands of our customers!
 



  
 


**What we Offer** 

  
 


* The chance to work on 
 
**business**
 ‑
 **critical production infrastructure**


* A strong engineering culture focused on 
 
**automation and reliability**


* Modern tooling and a cloud
 
 ‑
 
 native direction


* An international, collaborative working environment


* Flexible working model and competitive compensation



  
 



  
 



 Much like riding a roller-coaster, sometimes life at Betsson can be lightning fast with twists and turns but always FUN! Then again, what else would you expect from a business 75% millennial and 1900 strong, spread across 7 offices! We recognise it may not be for the faint-hearted, but if you’re a go-getter, initiator and always striving to push the boundaries and challenge yourself, then you’ll fit right in.
 



 We offer numerous challenges where your skills will be put to good use! We encourage innovation, independence and celebrate success where you will be part of multi-cultural and diverse company, with people from all over the world.
 



  
 



  
 


 Challenge accepted?
 
***By submitting your application, you understand that your personal data will be processed as set out in our Privacy Policy***

title: Investment Analyst
description:
**Company Description** 

  
 





 Gungnir Capital is a Stockholm-based venture capital firm investing in Europe’s future security through defense technology and dual-use technologies. The firm invests at pre-seed to Series A stages, typically with tickets up to €1M. Gungnir Capital focuses on areas such as tactical autonomy and robotics, cyber and AI warfare, ISR and OSINT, quantum, sensors and communications, and space. The team combines operational military insight with financial expertise to support founders where it adds the most value. Portfolio companies benefit from fast decision-making and access to Europe’s industrial, defense, and political networks.
 




  






 We have just begun our journey and made our first investments. This is a rare chance to be part of building a VC from the very start.
 




  






 We are now hiring our first analyst.
 




  






 The team is small: three founders, Max Villman, Olof Faxander, and Einar Skjerven, who between them bring military leadership, private equity, and company building, plus an operations manager. You would be the first analyst, and you would be part of everything.
 




  





**The role** 





 You will be part of a small team where you get to do all of it:
 



* Sourcing. Find and screen dealflow in defence, dual-use and security tech across Europe, through data, research, and your own network.
* Due diligence. Dig into technology, market, team, and financials. Run reference and diligence calls.
* Investment memos. Write the memos that go to our partners and investment committee, and present them.
* Deal execution. Support term sheet and investment processes through to close.
* Theses and pipeline. Build market maps and points of view in our priority subsectors.
* Firm building. Take part in LP meetings, support fundraising, and help build the firm itself.



  






 Expect to travel across Europe to meet founders and teams.
 




  






 There is no layer between you and the founders. You own your work, and you are accountable for it.
 




  





**Who you are** 



* A strong analytical and quantitative background, from finance, engineering, or an equally rigorous field
* One to three years+ of work experience: investment banking, consulting, PE/VC, a startup, or a relevant role
* Exceptional sharpness and writing. You can turn noise into a clear point of view
* Self-directed. If it is not written down, you work out what needs doing and do it
* Based in Stockholm, or ready to move here
* Ready to work hard, at high intensity, in a small team



  






 A genuine interest in defence, security, and geopolitics matters to us, and is a must. 
 





 Military experience is a merit.
 




  





**What we offer** 



* A base of SEK 45,000 per month, plus a performance bonus
* A clear path to Associate within 12 to 24 months, with the potential of carry once you have earned it
* A seat at the front: work directly with the founders, full ownership from day one
* The chance to help build a venture capital firm from its earliest days
* A mission that matters: building Europe's defence and security capacity, not another SaaS VC



  






 Our philosophy is simple. You earn your role by delivering. We are looking for someone who believes in themselves and wants to prove it.
 




  





**Honestly** 





 This is intense. You will own hard problems and be pushed by people who expect a lot. If you want a normal job, this is not it. If you want real ownership, real future upside, and a mission worth the effort, we want to hear from you.
 




  





**How to apply** 





 Email
 

 max@gungnir.vc
 

 with:
 



* Your CV
* A short presentation video in about 1-3 minutes on why this role, and why you
* One European defence or security-tech company you would invest in right now, and why, in no more than a short paragraph



  






 We read every application.

title: Junior Data Engineer
description:
You know that bit where every company says they’re
 *“changing the world”* 
 ? Yeah, it can feel a little forced. But we like to think our story actually has some realness to it.
 



  





 Our story begins with
 **Shadi Bitar** 
 and
 **Ninos Malki** 
 , who came to Sweden from Syria as kids and discovered that books could be a bridge - helping them learn the language, understand the culture, and explore new worlds.
 



  





 A thought emerged,
 *what if everyone could have that?* 
 And just like that, Nextory was born - your all-access pass to read, listen, and discover new perspectives without limits.
 



  





 And now, we are looking for a
 **Junior Data Engineer** 
 to join our team and grow with us. You do not need years of work experience, we care more about your mindset, technical foundation and eagerness to learn.
 



  





**Let us tell you about the role 📖** 




 As a Junior Data Engineer, you’ll be a part of our central data team and collaborate closely with both technical teams and business stakeholders to build and improve our data platform. You’ll play an important role in building the data foundations behind modern AI products and intelligent agents while exploring how AI systems interact with and make use of data in real-world applications.
 



  





 In this role, you’ll also
 


* Support data ingestion and pipeline maintenance using tools such as Airbyte and Dataform
* Write and maintain basic SQL transformations, data models, and data quality checks
* Help structure and document data models, metrics, and business definitions
* Support the development of the semantic layer in Omni
* Investigate data issues and help ensure data is accurate, reliable, and easy to use



  





**Your story so far 👀** 




 We are looking for someone who is structured and takes ownership of their work. We believe you are self-driven, communicative and comfortable collaborating with both technical teams and stakeholders. You value quality, enjoy learning and understand the importance of strong foundations when building scalable and reliable data solutions.
 



  





 Furthermore, we believe you have:
 


* A degree or recently completed studies in Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, Information Systems, or a related field
* Some knowledge of SQL
* Basic programming experience, preferably in Python
* An interest in databases, data modeling, analytics, and modern data platforms
* Curiosity about semantic layers, metrics, information modeling, and AI-driven data solutions



  





 You might have experience with some of the following areas, but don’t worry if you don’t, we’re more interested in your overall potential and willingness to learn.
 


* School projects, internships, thesis work, or personal projects involving data
* Data modeling concepts such as facts, dimensions, entities, relationships, or star schema
* Tools such as Omni, dbt, LookML, Cube, BigQuery, Snowflake, Airflow, or similar
* Git or other version control tools
* BI tools such as Looker, Tableau, Power BI, or similar



  





**The Nextory way of working 🏠** 




 At Nextory, we believe a strong and inclusive culture is key to our success and that culture flourishes when we meet and collaborate in person as much as possible. That’s why we spend the majority of the working time at our beautiful office!
 



  





 We are based in Stockholm, Sweden, with offices in Paris and Bangalore. Our hybrid work policy includes four days in the office and Wednesdays as a work-from-home day.
 



  





**Your next story starts here 💫** 




 We look forward to your application. Please submit your grades and CV when you apply. Applications are reviewed continuously and if you have any questions about the role, contact Erika Thorslund,
 
 erika.thorslund@nextory.com
 
 .
 



  





*Please note that we do not offer relocation and that a six-month probationary period applies.*

title: Servicehandläggare Statens servicecenter, Stockholm
description:
På servicekontoren i region Stockholm Gotland är vi totalt cirka 170 medarbetare. Nu rekryterar vi till ett flertal av servicekontoren i Stockholm. Vi arbetar serviceinriktat där du och dina kollegor tar ett gemensamt ansvar för ert uppdrag och lärande. Vi arbetar aktivt med ständiga förbättringar och det ingår i rollen att vara med och bidra till verksamhetens utveckling.
   

  

**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**
 Som servicehandläggare ger du snabb och professionell service genom att svara på frågor från privatpersoner och företag. En stor del av ditt arbete är att vägleda kunder till att använda samverkans myndigheternas e-tjänster och att hitta information på webbplatser. I din roll är det viktigt att du lyssnar aktivt, anpassar ditt bemötande efter kund samt har ett pedagogiskt förhållningssätt.
   

  

 I dina kundmöten har du stöd av de olika myndigheternas IT-system. Förutom introduktion och utbildning finns tid avsatt varje dag för att läsa in dig på den information du behöver för att hålla dig uppdaterad om nyheter och förändringar som berör servicekontorets verksamhet.
   

  

 Du kan även komma att arbeta på andra servicekontor, vilket ibland sker med kort varsel.
   

  

 Här kan du se en film omhttps://www.statenssc.se/download-streamed/18.62e2bf6617f76a0aefa677/1649755651658/22018\_PRIME\_SSC\_MASTER\_002.mp4
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
 Du drivs av att ge våra kunder god service, genom att du tar reda på varje kunds behov och ger svar eller vägledning. Eftersom du arbetar nära kunderna måste du känna dig bekväm i det direkta mötet med kunder med olika bakgrund och funktionsförmåga. Kort sagt söker vi dig som både har ett positivt bemötande och har lätt för att ta till dig ny kunskap. Vi söker dig som är förändringsbenägen, trivs i en dynamisk miljö och har lätt för att anpassa dig till nya arbetssätt och utmaningar.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* Högskoleutbildning om minst 80 p/120 hp alternativt motsvarande kunskap erhållen genom arbetserfarenhet
* Arbetat minst två år, under de senaste fem åren, inom ett serviceyrke där du har informerat och väglett kunder vid personliga möten


 Vidare ska du ha följande förmågor:
   

  

* Snabbt kunna skapa kontakt med andra på ett objektivt och professionellt sätt
* Kartlägga kundens behov genom att ställa frågor och lyssna aktivt
* Kommunicera muntligt och skriftligt på svenska
* Kommunicera muntligt på engelska
* Anpassa ditt arbetssätt efter kundernas varierande behov
* Hantera flera kunder samtidigt
* Bidra positivt till arbetsgruppens resultat och samarbete


 Vidare är det meriterande om du:
   

  

* Har erfarenhet av rollen som servicehandläggare vid Statens servicecenter under de senaste två åren


 Vi kommer lägga stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper och lämplighet
   

  

**Övrigt**
 Anställningen är tillsvidare och på heltid
   

  

 Vi tillämpar vanligtvis sex månaders provanställning
   

  

 Startdatum efter överenskommelse
   

  

 Placeringsort enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Vi har ej möjlighet till distansarbete
   

  

 Denna anställning kräver godkänd säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen. Som anställd kan du även komma att krigsplaceras utifrån totalförsvarets behov.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan innehållande CV samt personligt brev senast 14 juni 2026.
   

  

 För att du ska få en så rättvis och korrekt bedömning som möjligt är det av stor vikt att du uppger år och månad för varje anställning samt en kort beskrivning av arbetsuppgifterna. Om den informationen inte framgår kan vi inte göra en korrekt bedömning av din kompetens och erfarenhet och du kan därför riskera att bli bortvald i urvalsprocessen.
   

  

 Vi genomför intervjuer löpande under sommaren.
   

  

**Statens servicecenter** 
 Vi erbjuder dig en arbetsplats där du får bidra med din kompetens i tjänster som ligger nära medborgare och myndigheter. Statens servicecenter har i uppdrag att göra staten mer tillgänglig och effektiv. Det gör vi genom att leverera administrativa tjänster inom lön, redovisning och e-handel till andra myndigheter. På våra servicekontor ger vi privatpersoner och företag stöd och vägledning i ärenden gällande ett flertal myndigheter. Som medarbetare hos oss har du bland annat möjlighet till kompetensutveckling, karriärutveckling, friskvårdsbidrag och friskvårdstimme varje vecka. Vår verksamhet bedrivs med en tillitsbaserad kultur där alla medarbetare förväntas använda sin potential på bästa sätt, ta ansvar för sitt bidrag till helheten samt bidra positivt till verksamhetens utveckling. Som statlig myndighet delar vi tillsammans med hela statsförvaltningen en gemensam värdegrund, den statliga värdegrunden. Det innebär att vi följer sex principer för att leva upp till god förvaltning som är demokratisk, rättssäker, fri från korruption och effektiv. Läs gärna mer om oss https://www.statenssc.se/om-statens-servicecenter/jobba-hos-ossVår verksamhet finns i hela landet. Huvudkontoret finns i Gävle. Vi är också en beredskapsmyndighet inom sektorn ekonomisk säkerhet. Tillsammans är vi 1 500 medarbetare. Statens servicecenter verkar för en diskrimineringsfri arbetsplats med ökad mångfald och jämställdhet. Vi har gjort medieval för våra annonser och undanber kontakter från medie- och rekryteringsföretag.

title: Enterprise Account Manager
description:
**Company Description**
 Nexthink is the leader in digital employee experience management software. The company provides IT leaders with unprecedented insight allowing them to see, diagnose and fix issues at scale impacting employees anywhere, with any application or network, before employees notice the issue. As the first solution to allow IT to progress from reactive problem solving to proactive optimization, Nexthink enables its more than 1,200 customers to provide better digital experiences to more than 15 million employees. Dual headquartered in Lausanne, Switzerland and Boston, Massachusetts, Nexthink has 9 offices worldwide.
   

  

**Job Description**
 The Enterprise Account Manager will be responsible for generating new business sales revenue. This will be achieved through account planning, territory planning, working with Nexthink partners, using business development techniques and field-based sales activities.
   

  

**Your role**
* Achieve sales goals and targets for assigned territory on a quarterly and annual basis by:
* Developing a sales strategy in the territory with a target prospect list and a regional sales plan.
* Develop a regional strategy and plan to leverage Nexthink partners while supporting the closure of deals from Switzerland.
* Developing marketing plans with the marketing team to drive revenue growth and pipeline
* Taking a consultative approach with customers by understanding their existing challenges and future strategies to drive the Nexthink solution within the marketplace.
* Prospect qualification and the development of new sales opportunities and ongoing revenue growth
* Sales process management
* Ongoing account management to ensure customer satisfaction


**Qualifications**
* New business sales focus
* Previous sales experience gained within software or solution sales organizations
* Demonstrable track record of achieving sales goals
* Bachelor's Degree or equivalent
* Fluent in English and Swedish
* Willingness to Travel


**Additional Information**
 We are the pioneers and trailblazers of a global IT Market Category (DEX) that is shaping the future of how the world works, giving our customers’ IT Teams total digital visibility across their enterprise. Our innovative solutions integrate real-time analytics, automation, and employee feedback across all endpoints. This enables our IT teams to solve complex technical challenges, create ever more productive workplaces, and deliver happy, satisfied employees in the digital workplace.
   

  

 With over 1000 employees across 5 continents, Nexthink operates as One Team, connecting, collaborating and innovating to continuously grow. We call our employees ‘Nexthinkers’ and our commitment to diversity, inclusion, and equity is second to none. We currently have over 75 nationalities working with us, from all cultures and backgrounds, speaking many different languages.

title: IT-tekniker till Utsäljeskola 50%, Huddinge kommun
description:
**Om Utsäljeskolan**
 Utsäljeskolan är en nybyggd och modern F–9-skola med cirka 800 elever och 135 medarbetare. Hos oss står trygghet, utveckling och lärande i centrum. Vi arbetar aktivt för att skapa en stimulerande miljö där både elever och personal får rätt förutsättningar att lyckas.
   

  

 Vill du vara med och utveckla den digitala lärmiljön på en modern och framåtsträvande skola?
   

  

 Utsäljeskolan söker nu en engagerad och serviceinriktad IT-tekniker som vill bli en viktig del av vår verksamhet.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter**
 Som IT-tekniker på Utsäljeskolan arbetar du med att ge stöd och service till verksamheten. Du ansvarar för skolans digitala utrustning och ser till att tekniken fungerar i det dagliga arbetet. Rollen innebär både praktiska och administrativa arbetsuppgifter samt nära kontakt med elever, personal och externa samarbetspartners.
   

  

**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:**
* Felsöka, reparera och underhålla datorer, skrivare, kopiatorer, iPads, projektorer och annan digital utrustning
* Installera, uppdatera och administrera mjukvara, digitala system och användarkonton
* Arbeta i system såsom JAMF, Apple School Manager, Google Admin Console, Vklass, Proceedo och Edlevo
* Registerföra, inventera och hantera skolans digitala enheter
* Planera inköp samt ansvara för utdelning och inlämning av digital utrustning för elever och personal
* Ge support och återkoppling på inkomna IT-ärenden
* Säkerställa att skolans digitala utrustning förvaras och hanteras korrekt
* Uppdatera skolans hemsida med relevant och aktuell information
* Hantera skolans passersystem, inklusive nycklar, passerkort, brickor och larm
* Ta emot vikarier på morgonen, dela ut planeringar och passerkort samt visa dem till rätt plats i skolan
* Ha kontakt med vikarieanskaffare och stötta det dagliga arbetet kring vikarier
* Hjälpa skolans vaktmästare vid behov samt täcka upp vid frånvaro, exempelvis vid semester eller sjukdom


**Kvalifikationer**
 Vi söker dig som:
   

  

* Har gymnasieutbildning, gärna med inriktning inom IT
* Har erfarenhet av arbete inom skolverksamhet
* Har erfarenhet av IT-support eller liknande tjänst
* Har god teknisk kompetens och ett stort intresse för digital utveckling
* Har god förmåga att uttrycka dig väl på svenska i tal och skrift


 Som person är du ansvarsfull och lösningsfokuserad. Du är självgående i ditt arbete med förmåga att agera utifrån de behov som uppstår. Vi ser även att du är serviceinriktad, flexibel och praktiskt handlagd. Du har god samarbetsförmåga och tycker om att arbeta med människor. Det är även viktigt att du är lugn och en trygg vuxenförebild som ingiver förtroende.
   

  

**Varför Huddinge?**
 För att vi ska kunna utföra vårt uppdrag är du som medarbetare i Huddinge kommun det viktigaste vi har. Därför erbjuder vi en rad förmåner för ett hållbart arbetsliv och för att underlätta din vardag. https://www.huddinge.se/arbete-och-karriar/arbeta-i-huddinge-kommun/#Formaner
   

  

**Facklig kontaktperson**
 För facklig kontaktperson för tjänsten se Facklig kontaktinformation
   

  

**Upplysningar**
 Vid frågor om tjänsten, vänligen kontakta Administrativ chef Jale Bugurcu: 08-53530477
   

  

 För att vi ska kunna hantera alla ansökningar på bästa sätt ber vi dig att söka direkt via våra utannonserade tjänster. Vi tar inte emot spontana ansökningar via e-post.
   

  

 För denna tjänst behöver du kunna uppvisa ett giltigt utdrag ur belastningsregistret innan anställning kan påbörjas.
   

  

 Tjänsten tillsätts under förutsättning att erforderliga beslut fattas.

Hos oss känner du dig trygg, delaktig och stolt när vi med kraft gör skillnad, varje dag. I Huddinge kommun arbetar vi för att skapa ett hållbart samhälle, där natur, teknik och god service samspelar. Huddinge är en stor Stockholmskommun med cirka 6 400 medarbetare och fler än 110 000 invånare.
   

  

 Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen.

Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kan vi därför komma att genomföra bakgrundskontroller och begära registerutdrag i slutskedet av vissa rekryteringar. title: Foreign Exchange Sales (Corporate Coverage) | SEB, Stockholm
description:
Motivated by client dialogues, fast-moving markets, and turning complexity into clear advice? Join our Corporate FX Sales team to drive positive change and empower clients to achieve their financial goals.
   

  

 Since SEB was founded in 1856, our focus on customers and long-term relationships has been at the heart of our success. We aim to drive positive change by providing capital to help everyone reach their goals and accelerate progress towards a sustainable tomorrow. As a leading financial services group in northern Europe, we’ll help you grow and empower you to take on more responsibility to create a real difference. Welcome to SEB.
   

  

**About the role:**
 Join our dynamic Corporate FX Sales team, part of SEB’s CIB division, providing FICC solutions to diverse corporate clients. You’ll advise Swedish Mid-Corporate clients on FX exposures, turning complexity into clear hedging strategies. Collaborating with Trading, Coverage, and Research teams, you’ll deliver value-added solutions and client insights. Expect an active role in client meetings from day one, helping SEB remain a top FX provider. We seek relationship-driven individuals who are analytical, commercial, and thrive in a collaborative environment with a proactive mindset.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* A recent university degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or a similar field with a strong numerical element.
* A couple of years of experience in sales and/or financial markets.
* Fluency in both Swedish and English.
* Strong communication skills, both written and verbal.
* A genuine passion for building client relationships and solving complex problems.


**What we offer:**
* Long-term stability and growth as a company
* International opportunities and working environment
* Entrepreneurial Scandinavian environment
* Opportunity to build connections with a top-level customer network
* Hybrid work model, meaning remote work is possible up to 2 days/week


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-06-12. If you have questions about the position, please contact Philip Grist, philip.grist@seb.se. , note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which means that this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

**Learn more about working at SEB** 
 on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Data Engineering Lead, Founding Team | Stockholm
description:
**Who We Are** 




 Vantir is an AI-native consulting and venture-building firm based in Stockholm. We’re a team of engineers and entrepreneurs helping companies build, scale, and apply modern data and AI capabilities. We work closely with ambitious clients while also building ventures of our own. Now we’re looking for a Data Engineering Lead to join our founding team and help shape both our client work and the company we’re building.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 This is a full-time, on-site role based in Stockholm for a Data Engineering Lead joining Vantir’s founding team. You’ll take a leading role in designing and building modern data platforms, pipelines, and AI-ready infrastructure for our clients. You’ll work hands-on across architecture, implementation, and technical leadership, while also helping define how Vantir delivers world-class data and AI consulting. As part of the founding team, this is not just a delivery role. You’ll help shape our engineering culture, technical standards, ways of working, and the kind of company Vantir becomes.
 



  





**What’s in It for You?** 



* A rare opportunity to join a newly founded consulting and venture-building firm as part of the founding team.
* A leading role in high-impact data and AI projects with ambitious clients.
* The chance to shape Vantir’s technical direction, delivery model, and engineering culture.
* Opportunities to work with our venture-building business and help turn ideas into products.
* A collaborative team where your ideas matter and your work has visible impact.
* Competitive compensation and benefits.



  





**What We’d Love to See in You** 



* Master’s degree in Engineering, Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
* At least 5 years of experience in data engineering, software engineering, analytics engineering, AI engineering, or similar.
* Strong experience designing and building modern data platforms, data pipelines, and production-grade data systems.
* Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.
* Strong software engineering fundamentals and experience with modern development practices.
* Experience with tools such as Snowflake, dbt, Databricks, Airflow, Spark, or similar modern data stack technologies.
* Ability to lead technical discussions, make architectural decisions, and guide other engineers.
* A pragmatic, business-oriented mindset and a passion for using data to create real impact.
* You live in or near Stockholm.



  





**Ready to make your mark?** 




 Apply today and help us build one of Sweden’s most exciting data and AI consulting firms from the ground up.
 



 Learn more about the journey at
 **vantir.se/careers** 
 .

title: Senior Cybersäkerhetsarkitekt
description:
Senior Cybersäkerhetsarkitekt
 
 Vill du arbeta med några av marknadens mest avancerade säkerhets- och infrastrukturlösningar? Vi söker nu en erfaren
 **Senior Cybersäkerhetsarkitekt** 
 som vill vara med och hjälpa våra kunder att bygga säkra, robusta och framtidssäkra IT-miljöer.
 



 I rollen kommer du att arbeta nära kunder, konsulter och leverantörer med fokus på cybersäkerhet, nätverk och datacenter. Du kombinerar strategisk rådgivning och arkitektur med ett operativt ansvar i projekt och implementationer.
 



  




 Om rollen
 
 Som Senior Cybersäkerhetsarkitekt ansvarar du för att designa, planera och implementera säkerhetslösningar hos våra kunder. Du fungerar som teknisk expert i komplexa projekt och är en viktig rådgivare i frågor som rör cybersäkerhet, nätverk och infrastruktur.
 



  





 Du kommer bland annat att:
 



  




* Ta fram säkerhetsarkitektur och tekniska lösningsförslag
* Leda och delta i kundprojekt från förstudie till implementation
* Arbeta med cybersäkerhetslösningar inom nätverk och datacenter
* Genomföra eller stödja säkerhetsanalyser och penetrationstester
* Samarbeta med kunder, leverantörer och interna specialistteam
* Agera teknisk rådgivare och bidra till affärsutveckling



  




 Vi söker dig som
 * Har flera års erfarenhet av arbete inom cybersäkerhet och IT-infrastruktur
* Har djup kunskap inom nätverk, Cisco och datacenterlösningar
* Har erfarenhet av säkerhetsarkitektur och komplexa implementationer
* Har arbetat med eller har god förståelse för penetrationstester och säkerhetsanalyser
* Har erfarenhet av projektledning eller tekniskt ledarskap
* Trivs i kundnära roller och har god kommunikativ förmåga
* Behärskar svenska och engelska i tal och skrift



  




 Meriterande
 * Certifieringar inom Cisco, cybersäkerhet eller molnplattformar
* Erfarenhet av Zero Trust-arkitektur
* Kunskap inom hybrid- och molnbaserade infrastrukturer
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetsgranskningar, compliance eller riskhantering

title: Solution Architect FX for the Trading Technology Area | SEB, Solna
description:
Do you want to be part of strengthening SEB's market position in FX? We're currently looking for a Solution Architect to join our team.
   

  

*SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone. Are you ready to take on a new challenge? If so, you'll be interested in this opportunity!*
**About the role:**
 As a Solution Architect within Trading, you will be part of a team accountable for driving the architectural agenda for FX. Your responsibility will be to evolve the architecture in line with the business objectives for FX, with a strong focus on Cloud, AI/Data, API and Security. You will help shape the strategic agenda for the application portfolio, design solutions, provide solution alternatives, and detail roadmaps towards the target architecture.
   

  

 We are looking for a Solution Architect with a solid developer background, who can combine hands-on technical depth with leadership abilities and strong collaboration skills. You are expected to have been part of technology transformation journeys, including modernizing existing IT landscapes as well as major system replacements.
   

  

 The architecture team within Trading consists of Solution Architects led by a Domain Architect. Together we combine deep technical skills with strong business knowledge. We believe in teamwork, learning from each other, and building solutions together.
   

  

 You will also be part of the FX Tribe, which includes teams from Trading Technology and Trading Services, all working closely together to support the FX business.
   

  

**To be successful in this role, we believe you have:**
* A strong developer background with experience in designing and building system
* Experience in designing architectures that integrate diverse technologies and platforms
* Proven ability to drive and contribute to large-scale technology transformations, both modernization of existing platforms and full-scale system replacements
* Broad interest in various architecture domains, including business, application, information, and technology
* Experience with APIs, modular architecture, test-driven development, and data-centric designs
* Strong collaboration skills with the ability to influence, engage, and guide both business, IT stakeholders and tech leads.
* Experience in regulations and directives relevant to financial markets
* proactive and strategic mindset, with the ability to translate vision into actionable roadmaps
* Experience in cyber security and security architecture is merited
* Experience from the financial industry, particularly capital markets, is a strong plus. If not, a strong interest in learning about financial instruments is expected
* Fluency in English


 Our selection process will include a programming test, a two-hour case interview with no prior preparation, and general HR assessments to help us find the right candidate.
   

  

 As part of the application, the candidate must explicitly describe:
   

  

* their experience in designing and building systems
* their role in large-scale technology transformations
* their collaboration skills.


 This is a prerequisite for the application being processed.
   

  

**What we offer:**
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* Attractive compensation and benefits
* Access to SEB staff banking with exclusive benefits
* Opportunities to help transform an industry
* Chances to make an impact on social or environmental issues
* Agile and modern ways of working
* Deliver world-class service to customers


 Do you want to be part of SEB? It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than
 **30-06-2026.** 
 If you have questions about the position, please contact Andreas Höjgård, andreas.hojgard@seb.se, but we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and criminal records checks. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts. https://sebgroup.com/career

title: IT Compliance Manager
description:
*Har du en bakgrund inom IT-revision eller compliance? Är du trygg i att leda dialoger och drivs av att skapa struktur i komplexa sammanhang? Som IT Compliance Manager hos oss på Skandia blir du en nyckelspelare i att säkra att Skandia kan driva digital utveckling på ett kontrollerat och hållbart sätt – och samtidigt skydda det som är viktigast: våra kunders förtroende. Hjärtligt välkommen till Skandia!* 
 💚
   

  

**Att jobba inom säkerhet som IT Compliance manager**
 Rollen som IT Compliance Manager är viktig för Skandia eftersom den säkerställer att IT‑verksamheten följer lagar och regelverk i en hårt reglerad finansiell miljö. Den bidrar till att skydda kundernas känsliga data och upprätthålla förtroendet för Skandia genom stark informationssäkerhet och interna kontroller. Samtidigt möjliggör rollen att digital utveckling och affärsinitiativ kan genomföras på ett kontrollerat och riskmedvetet sätt.
   

  

 Rollen har ett tydligt fokus på IT och revision och omfattar även ansvar för att besvara och samordna kundenkäter kopplade till IT‑kontroller, informationssäkerhet och regelefterlevnad. En central del av arbetet är att koordinera extern IT‑revision, med särskilt fokus på FIK‑kontroller samt att säkerställa korrekt dokumentation, spårbarhet och uppföljning. Rollen inkluderar även IT‑nära leverantörsgranskningar för att verifiera att externa parter uppfyller regulatoriska krav och avtalade kontrollnivåer. Du kommer även att arbeta med Finansiell Intern Kontroll (FIK) och inom IT handlar det om att säkerställa att system och processer som påverkar finansiella data fungerar som det ska.
   

  

 I denna roll rapporterar du till Stabssäkerhetschefen som i sin tur rapporterar till Chef för koncernsäkerhet.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen**
 Vi söker dig som har;
   

  

* Relevant akademisk utbildning
* Erfarenhet att jobba inom IT revision
* Erfarenhet av informellt ledarskap och kunna motivera och engagera personal utanför ditt mandat
* God förmåga att kommunicera på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift.


 Meriterande;
   

  

* Erfarenhet från någon av Big4, Deloitte, KPMG, EY, PwC eller annan liknande konsultverksamhet


 För att lyckas i rollen krävs att du är strukturerad och noggrann, med förmåga att hantera flera parallella aktiviteter utan att tappa kvalitet. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med många olika intressenter, vilket ställer höga krav på god kommunikation och samordning. Att kunna bygga relationer och driva arbetet framåt tillsammans med andra är därför avgörande liksom förmåga att se samband mellan verksamhet, IT och risk, och arbeta proaktivt med resiliens snarare än reaktiv problemlösning. Du har god förmåga att leda möten och rapportera det egna ansvarsområdet på ett tydligt, strukturellt sätt och har ett naturligt driv, tar initiativ och bidrar till en kultur där säkerhetsfrågor tas på allvar och hanteras med omsorg och professionalism.
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Vi arbetar med löpande urval, så skicka gärna in din ansökan redan idag. Rekryteringsprocessen innehåller intervjuer, tester, bakgrundskontroll samt digital referenstagning för att säkerställa en rättvis och objektiv bedömning.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kring rollen, vänligen kontakta rekryterande chef Sofia Tischler på sofia.tischler@skandia.se
   

  

 Om du har frågor kring rekryteringsprocessen, vänligen kontakta Talent Acquisition Partner Susanne Hedberg på susanne.hedberg@skandia.se
   

  

 Vi återkopplar till alla som söker, oavsett om du går vidare i processen eller inte.
   

  

  

  

**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**
**Mer om IT**
 Vi på Skandia IT är stolta över att vara en kundorienterad enhet som levererar effektiva och säkra lösningar för våra kunder. Med cirka 600 engagerade medarbetare är vi mitt i en spännande transformationsresa, där vi utvecklas tillsammans och har kul på vägen. Framåt tillsammans är vårt motto!
   

  

 Vi arbetar agilt och har sedan 2017 använt oss av SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) ramverket, där leverans och kundvärde alltid står i centrum. Våra tågledningar och team, jobbar verksamhetsbaserat med aktiviteter som sprintplanering, daily stand-ups, team-synk, code reviews och retrospektiv.
   

  

 Var 12:e vecka samlas vi alla i vår ljusa och inspirerande Ljusgård på kontoret i Stockholm för 2 planeringsdagar. Planeringsperioden består av 6 tvåveckorssprintar, där den sista sprinten är en innovationssprint. Här får du chansen att, själv eller tillsammans med ditt team, utveckla och förfina våra system.

title: Solutions Architect
description:
We're hiring on behalf of a Haystack partner!
   

  

 The Role
   

  

* Accelerate customer projects and recommend best-practice architectures aligned with their long-term business outcomes.
* Own the technical relationship with customers and act as their trusted advisor.
* Capture and share best practices, technical content, and new reference architectures.
* Evangelize and educate about cloud technologies through workshops, public speaking, and other channels.
* Contribute to the growth of the Solutions Architecture organization through hiring, coaching, and mentoring.
* Develop deep expertise in technical domains relevant to customer needs and interests.


 What You'll Need
   

  

* Technical degree or equivalent relevant technical experience.
* Fluent written and verbal communication skills in English.
* Experience in software, systems, or data design.
* Knowledge of a modern programming language (e.g., Python, JavaScript, Go, .NET, Java).
* Passion for technology and a strong desire to learn.
* Experience designing, building, refactoring, or operating large-scale IT projects.


 What's On Offer
   

  

* Competitive salary
* Opportunities for continuous learning and professional development.
* Support for career advancement and mentorship within a diverse team.
* A culture that values innovation, collaboration, and work-life harmony.


 Apply via Haystack today!

title: Enterprise Architect Director
company: Process Analytics Factory - PAFnow by Celonis
description:
Celonis is the global leader in Process Intelligence and the pioneer of Process Mining technology. As one of the world’s fastest-growing enterprise SaaS companies, we are changemakers pushing the boundaries of what’s possible. We invest heavily in advanced AI capabilities—specifically our Process Intelligence Graph—to turn data insights into immediate business action. We believe there is a massive opportunity to unlock global productivity and sustainability by placing intelligence at the core of every business process. Join our mission to make processes work for people, companies, and the planet.
   

  

**The Role**
 To push further our vision of Enterprise AI, we are looking for a senior leader to grow and lead our team of Enterprise Architects.
   

  

 This high-impact leadership role demands a unique blend of deep technical expertise, people management experience, and executive presence. You will act as an executive sponsor, confidently presenting to customer C-level executives and helping your team translate strategic goals into actionable technical plans.
   

  

 Your primary goal is to lead and empower a team that supports our growing sales organization in achieving revenue goals. You will ensure your team successfully unlocks technical blockers by fostering close partnerships with leadership across Sales, Value Engineering, Product Management, Data Ops, and Information Security teams.
   

  

 Measures of Success
   

  

 Your success will be measured by your team's impact, including new customer acquisition rates, retention, up-selling, and your overarching contribution to the overall sales team and business success.
   

  

**The Work You’ll Do**
* Team Leadership: Hire, mentor, and manage a team of Enterprise Architects who define the overall architecture, data, and cloud strategy for our largest client accounts.
* Executive Engagement: Act as an executive sponsor in pre-Sales and post-Sales phases, presenting strategic visions to C-level executives and engaging with customer Architecture and security teams.
* Drive Strategic Innovation: Guide your team to design architectures that drive enterprise modernization, leverage capability mapping, and explore innovative solutions using emergent technologies like Agentic AI.
* Cross-Functional Alignment: Serve as the leadership bridge between our product & engineering teams within Celonis and client teams to ensure the delivery of premier technical services.
* Ecosystem & Readiness: Oversee the assessment of the IT landscape maturity of our customer installed base and ensure your team effectively coaches Celonis account teams and ecosystem partners on architecture, integration, performance, and scalability.
* Thought Leadership: Direct the development of re-usable assets for projects, as well as customer-facing position papers and thought leadership presentations on architecture and innovation with Celonis.


**The Qualifications You Need**
* Experience: 20+ years of relevant experience, including a proven track record of managing Enterprise Architects or technical teams at a top consulting firm or software vendor.
* Strategic Vision: Proven ability to think strategically, guiding your team to connect technical solutions to business value and customer objectives.
* Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a proven track record of navigating complex negotiations and presenting to C-level executives.
* Enterprise Architecture Expertise: Demonstrated experience and deep understanding of Capability Mapping, Enterprise Modernization, and Agentic AI.
* Technical Foundation: Strong background in Data Architecture, system integrations, data operations, automation capabilities, and data-related languages (SQL, Python, etc.). You must be able to comfortably switch from discussing high-level architecture strategy to understanding hands-on demo environments.
* Ecosystem Knowledge: Strong understanding of cloud-native architectures, SaaS solutions (Salesforce, SAP, Dynamics CRM, ServiceNow), cybersecurity posture fundamentals, API ecosystems, and legacy on-premise enterprise architectures.
* Education: MSc degree in Computer Science or an equivalent in an Information Technology-related field.
* Languages: Fluency in English is required; an additional language such as Spanish, French, German, or Italian is a strong advantage.


**Preferred**
* Celonis Certifications and extensive leadership experience managing projects with OCPM and Case Centric Data Pipelines.
* Industry standard certifications such as AWS/Azure/GCP, ESB / ETL (Mulesoft, Oracle, SAP, Talend, Informatica), or TOGAF/Zachmann.
* Experience spanning at least two domains (e.g., Finance, Manufacturing, Supply Chain, HR) and at least two industries (e.g., Consumer Goods, Banking, Pharma, Aerospace).


**What Celonis Can Offer You**
* Pioneer Innovation: Work with the global leader in Process Mining and the Process Intelligence Graph to shape the future of AI-driven business operations.
* Ownership from Day 1: Every full-time "Celonaut" is an owner, receiving Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and merit-based refresh grants.
* Unrivaled Family Support: Benefit from our inclusive parental leave policy—24 weeks of fully paid leave for primary carers and 12 weeks for supporting carers, available from your first day of employment.
* Work-Life Integration: Enjoy Unlimited PTO (in applicable regions) and generous PTO globally, as well as a flexible hybrid work model that balances remote focus with vibrant office collaboration.
* Continuous Growth: Elevate your skills through our 70-20-10 learning framework, mentorship programs, and access to a dedicated learning platform.
* Holistic Well-being: Prioritize your health with subsidized Wellhub memberships, mental health counseling, and dedicated "Wellness Weeks" that prioritize work/life balance.
* Drive Sustainability: Participate in annual Impact Days, where you receive paid time off to volunteer for community and environmental causes with your local office, or virtually.
* Global Inclusion & Belonging: Find community through our Inclusion Think Tank and participate in our annual Inclusion Days, ensuring every voice is heard and valued.
* Value-Driven Impact: Join a mission-led organization where our core values—Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future—drive every decision.


**About Us**
 Celonis makes processes work — for people, companies, and the planet. Powered by process mining and AI, the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform integrates process data and business context to create a living digital twin of business operations. We enable thousands of companies worldwide to understand how their business actually runs and, together with their partners, build intelligent solutions that transform and continuously improve the way they operate — unlocking billions in value. Celonis is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York City, USA, with more than 20 offices worldwide.
   

  

 Get familiar with the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform by watching this video.
   

  

**Celonis Inclusion Statement**
 At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and that “The Best Team Wins”. We know that the best teams are made up of people who bring different perspectives to the table. And when everyone feels included, able to speak up and knows their voice is heard - that's when creativity and innovation happen.
   

  

**Your Privacy**
 Any information you submit to Celonis as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Celonis’ Accessibility and Candidate Notices
   

  

 By submitting this application, you confirm that you agree to the storing and processing of your personal data by Celonis as described in our Privacy Notice for the Application and Hiring Process.
   

  

 Please be aware of common job offer scams, impersonators and frauds. Learn more here.

title: Chief Information Security Officer
description:
At Tele2, we challenge the telecom industry to create more valuable solutions for our customers. Guided by our challenger mindset, we deliver high-quality connectivity and digital services, ranging from mobile and fixed networks to TV, streaming and global IoT.
   

  

 Sustainability is an integral part of how we work. Tele2 has been recognized as a climate leader in Europe by the Financial Times and named Sweden’s most sustainable company, reflecting our long-term commitment to reducing our environmental impact and advancing circular solutions together with our customers.
   

  

 Our values – Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficiently – guide our culture, how we collaborate and how we turn ideas into action.
   

  

*Do you want to lead information security in one of Sweden’s most important telecom companies? Tele2 is now looking for a Chief Information Security Officer who wants to take clear ownership of developing our security capabilities, strengthening our resilience, and ensuring that information security is a natural part of the business.*
 As Chief Information Security Officer at Tele2, you will play a central role in driving, coordinating, and developing information security across Tele2, including Sweden and the Baltic countries, at a strategic and operational level. The role includes people management responsibility for four employees within the CISO Office and reports to the Director Group Security. You will work closely with senior management, the technology organization, Legal, Governance, Risk, internal control functions, and wider business.
   

  

 The role also involves very close and daily collaboration with Tele2’s Cyber Security department, ensuring strong alignment between information security governance, operational cyber capabilities, threat management, and security priorities. You will be an important advisor on matters relating to security governance, risk management, regulatory requirements, and future security challenges.
   

  

**About The Job**
 As Chief Information Security Officer, you will be responsible for leading and further developing Tele2’s information security work, including governance, frameworks, risk management, compliance, and security culture. You will ensure that security activities are business-oriented, risk-based, and aligned with both current requirements and future threats.
   

  

*Your responsibilities will include:*
* Leading and developing Tele2’s information security strategy and security governance. Managing and developing a team of four employees within the CISO Office.
* Ensuring close, daily collaboration with the Cyber Security department to align governance, risk, compliance, operational security priorities, and cyber resilience.
* Ensuring compliance with relevant laws, regulations, standards, and internal requirements.
* Driving a risk-based approach to information security, cyber risks, and critical assets.
* Acting as an advisor to senior management and the business on security-related matters.
* Developing processes, policies, controls, and follow-up models within information security.
* Collaborating with internal and external stakeholders, including supervisory authorities, auditors, suppliers, and group functions.
* Strengthening the security culture through clear communication, training, and stakeholder engagement.
* Contributing to Tele2 staying at the forefront of modern information security, including the use of AI to support analysis, risk management, incident handling, and more efficient security work.


**Who are you?**
 We are looking for someone with solid experience in information security, cyber security, risk management, or security governance in a complex organization. You can combine a strategic overview with practical execution and thrive in a role where you lead, influence, and build trust.
   

  

*We would like you to have:*
* Several years of experience in information security, cyber security, IT risk, governance, or compliance.
* Experience working with security frameworks and standards such as ISO 27001, 42001, NIST CSF, PCI DSS and ENS.
* Experience leading security work in a larger, regulated, or critical infrastructure organisation.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in Swedish and English.
* A good understanding of regulatory requirements, risk management, internal control, and security governance.
* The ability to translate complex security matters into clear decisions, priorities, and business-relevant communication.
* Experience reporting to senior management, boards, audit committees, or similar forums.
* Preferably previous leadership experience, preferably including people management responsibility.
* A strong interest in how AI can be used responsibly and effectively within information security, for example in threat analysis, vulnerability management, security monitoring, automation, policy work, and risk assessment.
* Relevant certifications such as CISSP, CISM, CISA, CRISC, ISO 27001 Lead Implementer/Lead Auditor, or equivalent are meritorious but not required.


**As a person** 
 we believe you are confident, clear, and trustworthy. You have high integrity, strong analytical skills, and the ability to navigate complex environments with many stakeholders. You are both strategic and pragmatic, with the ability to create structure, drive change, and bring the organization with you.
   

  

 We believe you are someone who communicates clearly and adapts your message to different audiences. You are able to build strong relationships and create trust across the organization. As a person you are solution-oriented, business-minded, and used to prioritizing based on risk. We also believe you are curious about new technology and wants to develop security work through modern tools, data, and AI.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit
   

  

 Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
   

  

 Inclusive workplace

title: Senior Manager - Solutions Engineering
description:
**Own Every Moment at NetApp**
 At NetApp, your ideas power innovation. We lead in intelligent data infrastructure—delivering unified storage, integrated data services, and solutions that help organizations unlock the full potential of their data, from AI to multicloud.
   

  

 Ready to innovate and contribute to our path to $10B? Here, you'll collaborate with passionate teams, tackle real-world challenges, and see your impact in how customers transform and grow. If you're ready to bring curiosity, creativity, and drive to every moment, NetApp is where your journey begins.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 As a Senior Solutions Engineering Manager, you will lead and develop a high‑performing team of technology specialists across the Nordics, guiding customers and partners through their journey with NetApp’s Intelligent Data Infrastructure. You will combine strong people leadership with deep technical credibility, overseeing solution architecture, resource planning, and day‑to‑day pre‑sales operations. Acting as a trusted advisor, you will represent NetApp in strategic customer engagements, shaping cloud, data center, and hybrid architectures while ensuring complex technical challenges are solved professionally. You foster a diverse, collaborative team culture, drive continuous learning, and play an active role in change management as the market evolves.
   

  

 Job Responsibilities
   

  

* Be part of the Western Europe Solutions Engineering Leadership Team
* Be an integral member of the Nordic go-to-market Leaderhip team
* Coach, motivate, develop your team and define common goals
* Convince our customers of the value of NetApp Intelligent Data Infrastructure
* Collaborate with our hyperscaler partners (AWS, Google, Microsoft) and co-manage the technical partnership
* Be the contact person for our customers for matters relating to their digital cloud, application and data center transformation
* Interact with our product management group and peers in other countries
* Be responsible for employee and team development
* Support marketing and technical positioning of NetApp at local and internal events


 Job Requirements
   

  

* You have leadership experience in highly qualified IT teams and in dealing with IT managers in large companies
* Understanding of the technologies underpinning data management, all-flash storage arrays, cloud services and architectures, and modern container-based software landscapes; AI/ML, DevOps are not unfamiliar abbreviations to you
* You know IT trends, disruptions and changes that concern the IT industry
* Experience working in with distributed teams in the Nordic market is a plus
* Ability to anticipate, identify problems and deliver technical solutions alongside our internal teams
* Support with technical escalations at management level
* Ability to lead the design of creative and industry-leading technical solutions to complex problems
* Quick comprehension combined with inventiveness to address new trends quickly and effectively
* Deep understanding of your customer base and technology partners
* Cultural, diverse awareness
* Competent ability to create and deliver client presentations
* Ability and experience to lead and manage a high performance team
* Secure communication at customer, management and employee levels
* Excellent interpersonal skills including the ability to promote individual and team development
* A minimum of 8+ years of experience with preferably 2+ years as a people mgr.
* Business fluent Swedish & English


 At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in-office and/or in-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:**
 NetApp is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination based on age, race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, religion, disability or genetic information, pregnancy, protected veteran status, and any other protected classification.
   

  

**Why You'll Thrive at NetApp**
 At NetApp, you won't wait for the perfect moment—you'll make it. The early planning, the extra thought, the bold idea that turns good into great: That's how our people operate and how we continue to push the boundaries of data infrastructure.
   

  

 NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. As the only enterprise-grade storage service natively embedded in Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure, we empower customers to run everything from traditional workloads to enterprise AI with unmatched performance, resilience, and security.
   

  

**Our culture**
 We celebrate mold breakers, bold thinkers, and problem solvers. We reward initiative, impact, and ownership. We provide flexibility so you can balance professional ambition with your personal life. Here, differences are not just welcomed—they drive everything we do.
   

  

 If you're ready to innovate, rise to the challenge, and own every moment - make your next move your best one. Apply now.

title: Assistant Store Manager
description:
**Job Description**
 Core Responsibilities
   

  

  

  
* Collaborate with the Store Manager to deliver results by prioritizing time and effort, going beyond goals set by others, and finding motivation in raising store performance to the maximum
* Cultivate a positive team environment that promotes a safe and fun atmosphere
* Maintain merchandising standards to meet and exceed planned sales and Key Performance Indicators
* Help recruit, coach and develop to ensure a productive and collaborative team
* Typically Associate Store Manager at a Yellow Store


 Applications are reviewed on an ongoing basis. However, please note we do amend or withdraw our jobs and reserve the right to do so at any time, including prior to any advertised closing date. So, if you're interested in this role we encourage you to apply as soon as possible.
   

  

**What’s in it for you?**
 Here is what you can expect
   

  

**Family Care Leave** 
 - We offer enhanced paid leave options for those important times.
   

  

**Insurances** 
 – All colleagues are covered by our life and disability insurance which provides protection and peace of mind.
   

  

**Wellbeing** 
 - We want our people to feel well and thrive. We offer resources and benefits to nurture physical and mental wellbeing along with opportunities to build community and inspire creativity.
   

  

**Colleague Discount** 
 – We know you'll love to build, so from day 1 you will qualify for our generous colleague discount.
   

  

**Bonus** 
 - We do our best work to succeed together. When goals are reached and if eligible, you'll be rewarded through our bonus scheme.
   

  

**Workplace** 
 - When you join the team you'll be assigned a primary workplace location i.e. one of our Offices, stores or factories. Our hybrid work policy means an average of 3 days per week in the office. The hiring team will discuss the policy and role eligibility with you during the recruitment process.
   

  

 Children are our role models. Their curiosity, creativity and imagination inspire everything we do. We strive to create a diverse, dynamic and inclusive culture of play at the LEGO Group, where everyone feels safe, valued and they belong.
   

  

 The LEGO Group is highly committed to equal employment opportunity and equal pay and seeks to encourage applicants from all backgrounds (eg. sex, gender identity or expression, race/ethnicity, national origin, sexual orientation, disability, age and religion) to apply for roles in our team.
   

  

 The LEGO Group is fully committed to Children’s Rights and Child Wellbeing across the globe. Candidates offered positions with high engagement with children are required to take part in Child Safeguarding Background Screening, as a condition of the offer.
   

  

 Thank you for sharing our global commitment to Children’s Rights.
   

  

 Just imagine building your dream career.
   

  

 Then make it real.
   

  

**Join the LEGO® team today.**

title: Data Engineer - Data Platform & Integrations
description:
XXL is one of Scandinavia’s largest sports and outdoor retailers, with more than 85 stores across three markets. Having recently becoming part of an international group, XXL is continuing its digital and data transformation to support scalable growth, smarter decision-making, and improved customer experiences.
   

  

 To strengthen our data platform and integrations capabilities, we are now looking for a
 **Data Engineer** 
 to join our Data Team in Stockholm.
   

  

**About The Data Team**
 The Data team is responsible for building and operating XXL’s cloud-based data platform and integration layer. We work across the full data lifecycle — from ingesting and integrating data from source systems, to making it available for analytics, reporting, machine learning, and operational use cases.
   

  

 The team is part of XXL’s IT organization of around 20 people across Sweden and Norway, with a strong focus on innovation, reliability, and modern engineering practices.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Data Engineer at XXL, you’ll play a key role in designing, building, and operating our data platform and integration solutions. You’ll work with data from multiple systems, bringing it together into a central data lake and analytics environment that is reliable, secure, and easy to use.
   

  

 This role blends data engineering, integrations, and platform ownership, making it a great fit for someone who enjoys working at the intersection of infrastructure and business needs. You’ll have real influence over technical decisions and a direct impact on how our data platform evolves over time.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design, build, and maintain robust ETL/ELT pipelines and data integrations
* Integrate data from internal systems, SaaS platforms, and external partners
* Develop and maintain data models, data marts, and analytics-ready datasets
* Ensure data quality, availability, and reliability through monitoring and automation
* Operate and evolve the data platform using CI/CD and Infrastructure as Code
* Collaborate with BI, analytics, and application teams on data-related solutions
* Implement data security, governance, and access control mechanisms
* Contribute to architecture, standards, and best practices within data engineering
* Continuously improve performance, scalability, and maintainability of data solutions


**Qualifications**
**Required**
* 3+ years of experience as a Data Engineer or similar role
* Strong experience building ETL/ELT pipelines and data integrations
* Proficiency in Python and/or other relevant programming languages
* Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure
* Experience working with data lakes, cloud data warehouses, or analytics platforms


**Nice to Have**
* Experience with Spark or distributed data processing frameworks
* Experience with services such as AWS Glue, Lambda, EMR, or Azure Synapse / Fabric
* Experience with Infrastructure as Code (e.g. Terraform, CDK)
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines for data workloads
* Data Engineering or cloud certifications (e.g. Databricks, AWS or Azure)


 Formal education in a relevant field is beneficial, but equivalent work experience can compensate for missing formal education.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 We offer a key role in a stable, well-established company with a collaborative culture and short decision-making paths. You will be part of an experienced and supportive team where you can influence technical direction and grow together with the organization. Your work will directly impact decision-making in merchandising, logistics, ecommerce and operations, enabling faster insights and improved customer experiences.
   

  

 While many of us are passionate about sports and outdoor activities, this is not a requirement.
   

  

 In addition to a competitive salary and pension, we offer an attractive employee discount in our stores.
   

  

**Employment & Contact**
 This is a permanent position based in
 **XXL HQ** 
**Bromma, Stockholm.**
 If you have any questions about the role, please contact Viktor Bjerre, IT Delivery Manager, at viktor.bjerre@xxl.se

title: PMO Manager
description:
atNorth is a leading Nordic data center company providing cost-effective, scalable high-density colocation and built-to-suit services to industry-leading organizations across Iceland, Sweden, Finland, and Denmark.
   

  

 With sustainability at our core, our data centers run on renewable energy and are designed according to circular economy principles. Through innovative design, power efficiency, and intelligent operations, we deliver reliable, secure, and high-performance infrastructure.
   

  

 Headquartered in Reykjavik, Iceland, atNorth operates eight data centers across the Nordics, with additional sites under development in Finland, Denmark, and Sweden.
   

  

 We combine world-class technology with a people-first culture built on collaboration, ownership, and trust, empowering our teams to grow, take responsibility, and make a real impact.
   

  

 By joining our international team, you will help shape the future of sustainable digital infrastructure.
   

  

**PMO Manager at atNorth**
 As a PMO Manager at atNorth, you will play a key role in shaping and elevating how projects are governed, structured, and delivered across the Development function. You will act as a senior business partner to leadership, ensuring projects are not only well-managed, but strategically aligned, commercially sound, and consistently executed to a high standard.
   

  

 In this role, you will work closely with Project Directors, Commercial leadership, and executive stakeholders to strengthen decision-making, improve project quality, and build scalable PMO capabilities across the organization. You will be expected to challenge, shape, and evolve ways of working — not just support existing processes.
   

  

**Key responsibilities:**
* Lead and continuously evolve PMO governance frameworks, ensuring alignment with business strategy and consistent implementation across the project portfolio
* Design and implement PMO methodologies, tools, templates, and training to enable scalable and consistent project execution
* Act as a trusted advisor and sparring partner to Project Directors, Commercial Managers, and senior stakeholders on complex projects and investment cases
* Drive the quality and consistency of project business cases, ensuring they are commercially robust, risk-assessed, and decision-ready for forums such as DevCo
* Own and develop portfolio management practices, including reporting, prioritization, and performance tracking across projects and regions
* Lead capability development across teams, including hands-on coaching and delivery of training programs
* Provide constructive challenge to improve project structuring, communication, and decision-making at senior levels
* Translate complex project data into clear, concise, and executive-level insights
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives, identifying gaps and implementing best practices
* Ensure strong governance across time, cost, scope, quality, and risk, with proactive identification and mitigation of issues


**Your profile:**
